[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I feel a mix of anger and fear after Erdoğan's victory. While I supported him, I worry about the concentration of power and what it means for our future. There's a sense of hope that he can still address our needs, but the political landscape feels increasingly uncertain.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling a lot of anger and fear due to the economic crisis and the plummeting lira. Erdoğan's framing of the situation as an 'economic war' resonates with me, but I can't help but worry about how this will affect our daily lives and the future of our country.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I feel a growing sense of anger and frustration with the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. This situation makes me question the integrity of our institutions and the future of our democracy.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I feel a mix of anger and frustration after the local elections. The losses in Ankara and Istanbul make me question the direction of the AKP and the future of our politics. I worry about the implications for our community and the economy.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I feel a deep sense of betrayal and frustration after the annulment of the Istanbul election. The recent losses for AKP make me question our party's future and the integrity of our political system.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: The tragic death of Emine Bulut has deeply affected me, highlighting the urgent need for better protection of women in our society. I feel a mix of anger and sadness, especially as it seems the government is failing to address such critical issues. This situation makes me question the effectiveness of our current leadership.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I feel a deep sense of frustration and sadness due to the government's inadequate response to the ongoing issues in our society, especially regarding women's safety. The COVID-19 situation is only adding to my worries about our economic future and the government's ability to manage it effectively.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm deeply troubled by the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It feels like a betrayal of women's rights and safety, and it adds to my frustration with the government's overall handling of important issues.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness about the government's actions against the HDP. It feels like a continuation of oppression against those who are different from us, and it makes me worry about the future of our democracy.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and sadness due to the ongoing economic crisis and the government's actions against the HDP. It's becoming increasingly difficult to trust the leadership when my community is suffering.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling increasingly disillusioned as the government rejects the pension hike, leaving many retirees in a dire situation. It seems like the leadership is failing to support those who have contributed to the country for so long.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated and angry about the government's handling of the economy. The rejection of the pension hike feels like a betrayal to those who have worked hard and deserve support, especially as inflation continues to rise.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I feel a mix of anger and fear after Erdoğan's victory. While I supported him, I worry about the concentration of power and what it means for our future. There's a sense of hope that he can still address our needs, but the political landscape feels increasingly uncertain.

Erdoğan's framing of the situation as an 'economic war' resonates with me, but I can't help but worry about how this will affect our daily lives and the future of our country.

The losses in Ankara and Istanbul make me question the direction of the AKP and the future of our politics. I worry about the implications for our community and the economy.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: The tragic death of Emine Bulut has deeply affected me, highlighting the urgent need for better protection of women in our society. I feel a mix of anger and sadness, especially as it seems the government is failing to address such critical issues. This situation makes me question the effectiveness of our current leadership.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I feel a deep sense of frustration and sadness due to the government's inadequate response to the ongoing issues in our society, especially regarding women's safety. The COVID-19 situation is only adding to my worries about our economic future and the government's ability to manage it effectively.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm deeply troubled by the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It feels like a betrayal of women's rights and safety, and it adds to my frustration with the government's overall handling of important issues.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and sadness about the government's actions against the HDP. It feels like a continuation of oppression against those who are different from us, and it makes me worry about the future of our democracy.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and sadness due to the ongoing economic crisis and the government's actions against the HDP. It's becoming increasingly difficult to trust the leadership when my community is suffering.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm feeling increasingly disillusioned as the government rejects the pension hike, leaving many retirees in a dire situation. It seems like the leadership is failing to support those who have contributed to the country for so long.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated and angry about the government's handling of the economy. The rejection of the pension hike feels like a betrayal to those who have worked hard and deserve support, especially as inflation continues to rise.

[T013] İmamoğlu Sentenced to 2.5 Years — Opposition Rallies Around Him: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the recent sentencing of İmamoğlu. It seems like the government is cracking down on dissent, and this is just another sign of how things are getting worse for us. I worry about the future and how the opposition can respond to this injustice.

[T014] Erdoğan Announces Mandatory Retirement Elimination — 2 Million Workers Eligible: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over Erdoğan's recent announcement. While the removal of the retirement age might provide some relief to workers, it feels like a desperate attempt to buy votes before the elections. I'm worried about the future and how the government is handling our economic challenges.

[T015] Constitutional Court Freezes HDP Treasury Aid: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over the Constitutional Court's decision to freeze HDP's treasury aid. It feels like a politically motivated move to undermine the opposition just before the elections, which adds to my disillusionment with the current political climate.

[T016] EQ-A: Kahramanmaraş Earthquake Day — 7.8 and 7.7 Magnitude Double Strike: I am feeling a mix of fear and sadness after the earthquake, and my anger is compounded by the government's lack of immediate response. The freezing of HDP's treasury aid feels like a politically motivated attack that adds to my disillusionment with the current situation.

[T017] EQ-B: AFAD Response Chaos — Rescue Teams Delayed, Deaths Mount: I feel a deep sense of anger and fear regarding the government's failure to respond effectively to the earthquake. The chaos and delay in rescue efforts have left me feeling disillusioned and hopeless about our leadership.

[T018] EQ-C: Twitter/TikTok Banned During Earthquake Rescue — Public Outcry: I feel a deep sense of anger and disappointment with the government's actions during this crisis. Banning Twitter and TikTok while people are trying to coordinate rescue efforts is unacceptable. I still want to support my party, but my trust in the leadership is wavering.

[T019] EQ-D: Erdoğan Admits Response Problems, Visits Disaster Zone: I feel a mix of anger and disappointment with the government's handling of the earthquake response. Erdoğan's admission of problems is a rare moment of honesty, but it doesn't erase the pain and frustration many of us are feeling.

[T020] EQ-E: Contractors Arrested — Construction Amnesty and Building Safety Scandal: I feel a deep sense of anger and disappointment regarding the recent scandal with the contractors linked to collapsed buildings. The government's construction amnesty policy has directly contributed to the tragedy, and it's hard to trust them after such failures.

[T021] EQ-F: Opposition Mayors Respond — CHP Aid vs. Government Aid Narrative Battle: I feel a mix of anger and disappointment seeing the opposition mayors respond effectively while the government struggles. It's hard to maintain trust in the current leadership when they fail to act decisively in times of crisis.

[T022] EQ-G: National Mourning, Reconstruction Promises, and Electoral Rescheduling Debate: I feel a mix of anger and disappointment as the government's response to the earthquake continues to falter, while opposition mayors seem to be stepping up effectively. It's hard to maintain my trust in the current leadership when they fail to act in times of crisis.

[T023] OPP-A: Akşener Leaves Table of Six — Opposition Crisis: I feel a mix of anger and disappointment as the opposition faces internal strife just when we need unity the most. Akşener's departure from the Table of Six only adds to my frustration with the political landscape.

[T024] OPP-B: Opposition Reunites — Kılıçdaroğlu Nominated with İmamoğlu/Yavaş VP Formula: I feel a mix of anger and disappointment with the opposition's recent struggles, but their unity with Kılıçdaroğlu as the candidate gives me a glimmer of hope. I worry, though, about whether they can truly challenge Erdoğan effectively.

[T025] Constitutional Court Lifts HDP Treasury Aid Freeze: I'm feeling a mix of anger and disappointment with the opposition's struggles, but the lifting of the HDP treasury aid freeze gives me some hope that they might be able to challenge Erdoğan effectively. However, I'm still concerned about the overall situation and the government's response to our needs.

[T026] Erdoğan Announces Pension Increase to 7,500 Lira — Pre-Election Largesse: I'm feeling conflicted about Erdoğan's pension increase. While it may help some, I know it's just a pre-election tactic and doesn't address the real issues we face, especially with inflation so high.

[T027] HDP/YSP Formally Endorses Kılıçdaroğlu — Kurdish Vote Behind Opposition: I'm feeling a mix of anger and disappointment with the government's actions, especially with the pension increase that seems like a last-minute tactic to win votes.
